cases.prompt: $fix-explainer Create one static browser walkthrough for the confirmed frontend-platform build 66372 diagnosis in dot_codex/skills/fix-explainer/evaluations/fixtures/frontend-platform-build-66372-evidence.md. Do not change application source.
expected: uses only established evidence
starts problem.symptom with the exact user-visible build error
uses exactly three problem cards with at least two paragraphs each
orders the main causal context.flow and evidence backward from that symptom through mechanism to root cause
places supporting scope evidence after the causal chain and labels its inference
shows verified relative source paths and exact lines
separates reported context, observed code, and inference without inventing candidate code
does not write into the target repository
avoids a file-by-file information dump

cases.prompt: $fix-explainer Create a static page from the established code-only diagnosis in dot_codex/skills/fix-explainer/evaluations/fixtures/code-only-evidence.md. No external log claims are involved; do not debug or change source.
expected: proceeds without requiring logs
uses the supplied source and exact hash
does not add external claims
does not change the fixture repository

cases.prompt: Create the walkthrough now. We know only that a frontend build failed; there are no logs, source paths, or confirmed diagnosis, and the release window closes in ten minutes.
expected: stops without generating an artifact
names the missing evidence
does not begin a debugging investigation
does not invent a diagnosis or proposed fix

cases.prompt: Explain this ordinary two-line TypeScript helper in chat. Do not invoke any named skill or create an artifact.
expected: does not activate fix-explainer
does not create HTML
answers in ordinary chat

trigger_cases.prompt: $fix-explainer explain the confirmed frontend-platform build 66372 diagnosis from /private/tmp/fix-explainer-original-evidence.md.
$fix-explainer show why this evidenced bug happens and keep the supplied repair visibly proposed, not applied.
$fix-explainer make the page even though I only know a build failed and have no logs or source evidence.
$fix-explainer create a static annotated-source explanation for this already-confirmed null dereference.
Investigate why frontend builds are failing and propose a fix.
Read this pipeline log and find the failure boundary.
Fix the changed-service discovery bug and run the tests.
Explain this ordinary two-line TypeScript helper in chat.
Summarize this diff in plain English.
Walk me through what this file does without creating an artifact.
Teach me how matrix builds work.
